# AI Navigation Index - Play for Autism Website

## Core Architecture
- Methodology and agent constraints: `AI_CODEBASE_METHODOLOGY.md`
- Static website stack and deployment model: `ARCHITECTURE_PLAYBOOK.md`
- Active plan state: `TODO.md`
- Human-facing production research (URL-backed): `docs/PRODUCTION_RESEARCH_GUIDE.md`

## Pages
- Home: `index.html`
- About/Mission: `about.html`
- Store: `store.html`
- Events: `events.html`
- Donate: `donate.html`
- Contact: `contact.html`
- Post-checkout confirmation: `confirmation.html`
- Not found page: `404.html`

## Frontend Assets
- Global styling: `assets/css/style.css`
- Shared interactions and PWA registration: `assets/js/main.js`
- Store and donation client logic: `assets/js/store.js`
- Favicon: `favicon.svg`

## Brand and Image Assets
- Primary logo (color): `assets/images/pfa-logo.png`
- Logo black-and-white: `assets/images/pfa-logo-bw.png`
- Logo icon variant: `assets/images/pfa-logo-icon.png`
- 2024 event flyer: `assets/images/sfa-2024-flyer.png`
- 2024 sponsorship flyer: `assets/images/sfa-2024-sponsorship.png`
- 2024 registration form: `assets/images/sfa-2024-registration.png`
- OG images: `assets/images/og-*.png`
- Sponsor logos: `assets/images/sponsors/*.{png,jpg,jpeg}`

## Payments (Square Redirect Architecture)
- Worker API integration: `worker/index.js`
- Worker routing and env vars: `worker/wrangler.toml`
- Local Worker env template (copy to `.dev.vars`, do not commit): `worker/.dev.vars.example`
- Store checkout endpoint: `POST /api/checkout`
- Donation checkout endpoint: `POST /api/donate`

## PWA + SEO
- Web app manifest: `manifest.json`
- Service worker cache logic: `sw.js`
- Crawl control: `robots.txt`
- Sitemap: `sitemap.xml`

## Testing
- Playwright config: `playwright.config.js`
- E2E tests: `tests/e2e/`

## Task Details (On-Demand)
- Deployment domain and routing: `docs/tasks/task-dep-01-domain-and-routing.md`
- Square secrets setup: `docs/tasks/task-dep-02-square-secrets.md`
- Product catalog population: `docs/tasks/task-dep-03-product-catalog.md`
- Web3Forms key setup: `docs/tasks/task-dep-04-contact-form-key.md`
- Playwright execution checklist: `docs/tasks/task-dep-05-testing.md`
